name: TTS-1

metadata.Voices: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer

text.description: The text to generate audio for. Maximum length is 4096 characters.

voice.description: The voice to use when generating the audio. Defaults to alloy.

response_format.description: The output format for the audio. Supported formats are mp3, opus, wav, aac and flac.

speed.description: The speed of the generated audio. Select a value from 0.25 to 4.0. 1.0 is the default.

audio.description: URL to the generated audio file
